description: Overwrite the remote branch with your local one, but only if nobody else pushed since you last fetched
intents: force push after rebasing without overwriting teammates work
push a rewritten history to the remote
update the remote branch after i squashed my commits
push my rebased branch to github
safely force push after editing history
overwrite the remote branch but only if nothing new is there
force push without clobbering someone elses recent work
